title: Luxury Villa Flooring - Dubai
description: Complete flooring solution for a 8,000 sq.ft luxury villa in Dubai using premium Makrana White Marble and Jodhpur Pink Sandstone. The project included custom-cut flooring, bathroom cladding, and exterior paving.
materialUsed: Makrana White Marble, Jodhpur Pink Sandstone

title: 5-Star Resort Landscaping - Maldives
description: Extensive landscaping project for a 5-star beach resort including pool decks, pathways, and feature walls using Teak Wood Sandstone Slabs and Mint Sandstone stepping stones.

title: Heritage Hotel Wall Cladding - London
description: Restoration and new extension cladding for a heritage hotel in London. Autumn Brown Sandstone wall cladding was used to blend seamlessly with the existing Victorian architecture.
materialUsed: Autumn Brown Sandstone, Buff Yellow Sandstone

title: Commercial Office Exterior - Singapore
description: High-rise commercial building exterior cladding project in Singapore's CBD using Grey Limestone Tiles and Kandla Grey Sandstone. Over 12,000 sq.m of stone installed.

title: Infinity Pool Deck - Bali
description: Stunning infinity pool deck and surrounding area for a luxury villa resort in Bali. Red Multicolour Sandstone and Jodhpur Pink Sandstone used to create a warm tropical ambiance.
materialUsed: Red Multicolour Sandstone, Jodhpur Pink Sandstone

title: Museum Public Spaces - Paris
description: Supply of Makrana White Marble and premium Indian sandstone for public spaces and galleries in a prestigious Paris museum, including entrance flooring and sculptural elements.
materialUsed: Makrana White Marble, Teak Wood Sandstone

title: Courtyard Cobblestone - Amsterdam
description: Traditional cobblestone courtyard restoration using authentic Buff Yellow Sandstone cobbles, maintaining the historic character of a 17th century Amsterdam canal house.

title: Luxury Apartment Complex - Melbourne
description: Supply and installation of natural stone for a 45-unit luxury apartment complex in Melbourne, including balcony tiles, lobby flooring, and facade cladding.
